description: Cost Reduction: Architected and executed migration of AWS services to On-Premise infrastructure, generating 80% savings in monthly costs.
Fraud Detection (Graylog): Implemented Graylog integrated with Firewall and Active Directory via Syslog to detect and mitigate daily payment fraud in Real-time.
Defensive Security: Implemented Wazuh as SIEM/XDR solution for endpoint security monitoring, vulnerability detection, and compliance.

Advanced Observability & API: Developed custom integrations via Zabbix API (JSON-RPC) for monitoring non-native entities, including automated domain expiration checks, license validity, and Wazuh alert correlation.
Server & AD Automation: Created Shell Script and Python scripts for complete extraction of users, paths, and data from Active Directory and Zabbix, plus automated reports via Cron Jobs.
Monitoring Enhancement: Identified and corrected gaps in monitoring processes, implementing improvements to increase coverage and efficiency.
Documentation Standardization: Developed and updated documentation for host naming and display-name standards, promoting consistency and clarity in processes.
Web Application Support: Diagnosed and fixed bugs in production websites, ensuring service availability and stability.
Deploy Management: Executed legacy application deployments via FTP, ensuring continuity of deliveries while planning modernization.
AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, CloudWatch): Managed cloud instances, storage, and monitoring.
Web Servers: Configuration and maintenance of Nginx and Apache as web servers and reverse proxies.
Load Balancers: Configuration of load balancing for traffic distribution.
CI/CD: Built continuous integration and delivery pipelines.
Monitoring: Implemented metrics and automation with Grafana, Zabbix, and Prometheus.
Containerization: Studies and hands-on labs with Docker and Kubernetes orchestration.
SQL Database modeling from scratch using Entity-Relationship Diagrams.
ETL in compliance with LGPD and TSE Resolution 23610.
Database administration and ETL script creation in Python.
Automation of electoral poll reports generation and communication system.
Data analysis for reports and automation of PDF report generation.
Data protection and governance in accordance with LGPD and TSE Resolution 23610.
Application software for data management, monitoring, and manipulation.
Monolithic architecture.
(NEW) Website and Landing Page development projects.
Cost, Financial and Management Accounting consulting.
Scheduling system project with Excel (+VBA).
Provided consulting for PC assembly, purchasing, sales, repairs, and installation.
Offered private math tutoring students (ages 10 and up).
